docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 SERVED SEP-16-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NOLFI, BIANCA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINNEGAN, ERIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOLFI, BIANCA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 INTEREST, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,410.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ERIN FINNEGAN. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,650.50 FILED BY FINNEGAN, ERIN AS TO DEFENDANT NOLFI, BIANCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
